title: Der Sittlichkeitsverbrecher
writer: Wolfgang Menge, Franz Schnyder, Richard Schweizer
actors: Peter Markus, Peter Arens, Freddy Karsten
plot: In exploring sex offenses, particularly against children, this film reveals the inner workings of the Zurich police and INTERPOL as they pursue persons accused of voyeurism, rape, fetishism, sadism, and masochism. After the crimin...
